Alter.description: Grants permission to alter a keyspace or table

AlterMultiRegionResource.description: Grants permission to alter a multiregion keyspace or table

Create.description: Grants permission to create a keyspace or table

CreateMultiRegionResource.description: Grants permission to create a multiregion keyspace or table

Drop.description: Grants permission to drop a keyspace or table

DropMultiRegionResource.description: Grants permission to drop a multiregion keyspace or table

GetRecords.description: Grants permission to retrieve the CDC stream records from a given shard

GetShardIterator.description: Grants permission to return a shard iterator

GetStream.description: Grants permission to return information about a CDC stream, including the composition of its shards

ListStreams.description: Grants permission to return an array of CDC stream ARNs associated with the current account and endpoint

Modify.description: Grants permission to INSERT, UPDATE or DELETE data in a table

ModifyMultiRegionResource.description: Grants permission to INSERT, UPDATE or DELETE data in a multiregion table

Restore.description: Grants permission to restore table from a backup

RestoreMultiRegionTable.description: Grants permission to restore multiregion table from a backup

Select.description: Grants permission to SELECT data from a table

SelectMultiRegionResource.description: Grants permission to SELECT data from a multiregion table

TagMultiRegionResource.description: Grants permission to tag a multiregion keyspace or table

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a keyspace, table, or stream

UnTagMultiRegionResource.description: Grants permission to untag a multiregion keyspace or table

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a keyspace, table or stream

UpdatePartitioner.description: Grants permission to UPDATE the partitioner in a system table

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters actions based on the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters actions based on tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters actions based on the presence of tag keys in the request
